message:
chore: Update Cargo.lock and sync beads issue tracking

This commit updates the dependency lock file and syncs the beads issue
tracking state.

Cargo.lock:
- Update dependency versions to reflect workspace changes
- Lock new dependencies: assert_cmd, predicates (glow dev-deps)
- Lock thiserror additions across affected crates
- Ensure reproducible builds with exact dependency versions

Beads Issue Tracking:
- Sync issues.jsonl with current project state
- Archive historical snapshot in .br_history/
- Track issue progress for error handling migration work

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
